name: agenticmail
description: 🎀 Surfaces every AgenticMail agent as a native Claude Code subagent (callable through the Agent tool) and exposes the full 62-tool AgenticMail MCP toolbelt to any Claude Code session.
author: agenticmail

claudeConfigPath.description: Path to Claude Code's user-level config (default: ~/.claude.json)

agentsDir.description: Directory where per-agent Claude Code subagent files are written (default: ~/.claude/agents)

mcpServerName.description: Key used under mcpServers in Claude Code config (default: agenticmail)

bridgeAgentName.description: Name of the dedicated AgenticMail agent that represents Claude Code (auto-provisioned if absent)

subagentPrefix.description: Prefix for the generated Claude Code subagent names (default: agenticmail-)

tools: Surfaces all 62 @agenticmail/mcp tools to Claude Code (mcp__agenticmail__*)
Plus one Claude Code subagent per AgenticMail agent (Agent { subagent_type: 'agenticmail-<name>' })
